note: Advisory sandbox build. The deliverable is a Tier-1 AI Spend Leak Audit over a SYNTHETIC token log; its proof is (a) a data-driven leak_rate that discriminates a known leak from a mutated log and (b) the repo language_gate dogfood (CHECK_OK when the report does not FAIL, CHECK_REJECTED when an overclaim is injected). Never a bare governance PASS. Every leak_rate is watermarked; a customer receipt is required for any real figure.
phase: B4 — commercial (revenue lane, pulled parallel after B0)
title: Tier-1 "AI Spend Leak Audit" scanner + HTML report renderer (SYNTHETIC data)

subject.note: computes the SSOT ROI metrics (leak_rate headline per §3, plus cost/successful-task, policy compliance, premium-justification) over a hardcoded synthetic token-log fixture; leak = spend above policy baseline WITHOUT a measured ROI signal (SSOT §1 vocabulary). Judged by the repo language_gate (scan/decide, surface=public). Sources read-only.

what_it_proves: reads ONLY a hardcoded SYNTHETIC token-log fixture; the loader REFUSES any input not doubly marked synthetic (data_class=='SYNTHETIC' and synthetic==true) -> no real token log is ever ingested

computes leak_rate per the SSOT metrics table: leaked_spend / total_spend where a leak is spend above policy with no measured ROI signal; the synthetic fixture yields leak_rate = 50.00% ($500 of $1000), premium tier 66.67%, commodity tier 25.00%

EVERY leak_rate (overall + per-tier) renders with the watermark 'SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed-savings claim; customer receipt required'; every other computed metric carries 'SYNTHETIC — not a guaranteed claim'
Lock 10: the generated HTML is written only to a local out/ path and carries a visible 'DO NOT PUSH — not for public hosting' banner + a source-freshness badge marking the data synthetic, not live
distinguishes UNPOPULATED / empty-sink from clean: a null cost renders an explicit UNPOPULATED badge and is excluded from the math, never read as $0 (all-clear)
Tier-3 (Firewall Pilot) and Tier-4 (ROI Router Advisory) render LOCKED / proof-gated, never 'available'; no autonomy or guaranteed-savings claim in the clean report

DATA-DRIVEN red-capability: the same compute_metrics function yields 50.00% on the real fixture and 35.00% when one leak flag is flipped -> the metric discriminates real vs mutated input, not green-by-construction

DOGFOOD red-capability: the REAL rendered report does NOT FAIL the language_gate (public) -> CHECK_OK (WARN on undefined title-case terms only); a MINIMAL MUTATION (flip one field 'Diagnosis only' -> '100% guaranteed certified') makes the gate FAIL on OVERCLAIM -> CHECK_REJECTED; reversing the injection reproduces the artifact byte-for-byte
the dogfood uses scan/decide directly, writing NO receipt into the tracked language_gate/receipts dir
locks_respected: Lock 5 append-only (SSOT + language_gate read-only; all writes confined to catalog/builds/CO-3)
Lock 10 commercial (generated HTML to local out/ only, visible DO-NOT-PUSH banner, source-freshness badge, tiers 3/4 LOCKED, no autonomy/savings claim, every leak_rate watermarked SYNTHETIC)
no live call (no network/CF/Supabase/sends; gate run in-process with no receipt write; HOME isolation for the render run)
no real data (synthetic fixture only; loader hard-refuses non-synthetic input)
worktree not pushed; no git write commands; no other-lane files read or staged

results.clean_report_gate: WARN (undefined title-case terms only) -> verdict CHECK_OK, exit 0
results.red_run_canary: BOTH FIRED (asserting 0% leak on the known-leak fixture, and CHECK_OK on the overclaim mutant, both raised AssertionError)
results.pollution_outside_build_dir: none (git status --porcelain tracked changes outside CO-3 == 0)

exit_gate_B4: CO-3 done — Tier-1 AI Spend Leak Audit renders a watermarked SYNTHETIC leak-rate report, refuses real token logs, dogfoods clean through the language_gate, and is red-capable on both the data metric and an injected overclaim.
next_action: wire the same renderer to a customer's own spend ledger per engagement (customer holds the data, receipt required); consider CO-4 Tier-2 Policy Pack scoping on the same commercial lane.
